data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_199F2C: Welcome to the BATTLE TOWER!\pPlease register with me to enter\na BATTLE ROOM.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_199F79: Would you like to make a BATTLE ROOM\nchallenge?
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_199FA9: We'll be looking forward to your\nnext challenge.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_199FDA: Before entering a BATTLE ROOM, your\nprogress must be saved. Is that okay?
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A024: There are two BATTLE ROOMS,\nLevel 50 and Level 100.\lWhich would you like to challenge?
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A07B: Please select the POKéMON you wish\nto enter.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A0A8: I'll direct you to your BATTLE ROOM now.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A0D1:
The BATTLE TOWER is a facility made
especially for POKéMON battles.\pWithin the TOWER are many BATTLE ROOMS.\pIn each BATTLE ROOM, seven TRAINERS
await your challenge.\pBeat all seven, and you will be rewarded
with a fabulous prize.\pYou may also take a break from your
challenge by saving your progress.\pMake sure you save properly or you
won't be able to resume your challenge.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A249: Excuse me!\pYou don't have three eligible POKéMON.\pYou must have three different POKéMON\nof Level 50 or less to enter.\pThey also must be holding different\nkinds of items.\pEGGS{STR_VAR_1} ineligible.\pPlease come see me when you are ready.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A32D: Excuse me!\pYou don't have three eligible POKéMON.\pYou must have three different POKéMON\nto enter.\pThey also must be holding different\nkinds of items.\pEGGS{STR_VAR_1} ineligible.\pPlease come see me when you are ready.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A3FD: Excuse me!\pYou didn't save before you quit your\nchallenge last time.\pBecause of that, your challenge so far\nhas been disqualified. Sorry!
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A4BB: For beating seven TRAINERS in a row,\nyou have earned this fabulous prize!\p
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A520: Oh, your BAG appears to be full.\pPlease make room in your BAG, then come\nsee me.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A589: Your record will be saved.\nPlease wait.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A5CE: Before entering a BATTLE ROOM, your\nprogress will be saved. Please wait.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A617: You're finally about to face the\n50th TRAINER.\pFrom here on, every time you beat seven\nTRAINERS in a row, your POKéMON will\lreceive a commemorative RIBBON.\pGood luck!
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A6BE: Here are some RIBBONS for beating\nseven tough TRAINERS in a row.\p{PLAYER} received some RIBBONS!
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A719: {PLAYER} put the RIBBONS on the\nchallenger POKéMON.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A747: Hello, hello!\nYou're going to battle here, right?\pCan you tell me what's going through\nyour mind as you prepare for battle?
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A7C3: Oh, wow, you'll tell me?\nGreat! Then, what's your answer?
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A7FD: Oh, so you don't think much about it?\nYou're one cool customer.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A83D: Hunh? You changed your mind?\nI guess you're fickle.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A871: Okay, so that's how you feel?\nThat's quite original.\pThanks!
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A8AE:
The number of matches you win in a row
is recorded.\pThe record is posted beside the
registration counter.\pIt's also on the back of your
TRAINER'S CARD.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A946: Once you've entered the BATTLE TOWER,\nyou can't leave until you either lose\lor you beat seven TRAINERS in a row.\pYou'd best be certain that you're up\nto the challenge.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A9EE:
Hahahaha! Pure magnificence!
Pure magnificence indeed!\pDo you realize what you've achieved?
You've beaten 50 TRAINERS in a row!\pYes, purely magnificent!\pAs the OWNER of the BATTLE TOWER,
let me give you a memento!
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19AAC4:
Wahahaha! Pure magnificence!
Absolutely pure magnificence indeed!\pDo you realize what you've achieved?
You've beaten 100 TRAINERS in a row!\pYes, absolutely magnificent!\pAs the OWNER of the BATTLE TOWER,
let me give you a memento!
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19ABAA: I suggest you keep it displayed.\nIt will surely attract attention.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19ABED: Oh?\nYour PC has no room for this...\pBut it would be a shame to waste this...\nPlease come back for this!
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19AC55: I'm overwhelmed with satisfaction after\nseeing your magnificent performance.\pIt makes the building of the BATTLE\nTOWER all worthwhile!
